entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in June 2018 and continuing to provide spot and derivatives trading under the Deepcoin brand, with publicly described legal entities and jurisdictions that remain only partially verified.
entity.notes: Official support material places Deepcoin's launch in June 2018. Public profiles variously associate the platform with Singapore, Seychelles, the United Arab Emirates, and entities named DEEPCOIN LIMITED or DEEPCOIN LABS DMCC. HEI retains the existing Singapore origin and medium confidence until a definitive current operating-entity source is verified.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Deepcoin brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in June 2018 and continuing to provide spot and derivatives trading under the Deepcoin brand, with publicly described legal entities and jurisdictions that remain only partially verified.

events.title: Deepcoin launched in June 2018
events.description: Deepcoin launched as a cryptocurrency exchange in June 2018 and developed spot and derivatives trading services.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish June 2018 but not an exact public launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

evidence.title: Introduction of Deepcoin
evidence.notes: Official support article identifies Deepcoin's launch in June 2018 and describes its spot and derivatives products.

evidence.title: CoinMarketCap exchange profile for Deepcoin
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the 2018 launch year and records a UAE DMCC group entity, while disclaiming verification of submitted profile data.

evidence.title: Deepcoin affiliate program agreement
evidence.notes: Official agreement identifies DEEPCOIN LIMITED as operating under the Deepcoin trading name, but does not resolve the current incorporation jurisdiction.

evidence.title: Deepcoin official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Deepcoin identity and active trading interface.
